verses.book: Other Fragments from the Lost Writings of Justin
verses.text: And Justin of Neapolis, a man who was not far separated from the apostles either in age or excellence, says that that which is mortal is inherited, but that which is immortal inherits; and that the flesh indeed dies, but the kingdom of heaven lives.—From Methodius On the Resurrection, in Photius.
